race.comment: PERFECT PICTURE (8) resumed with a smart win at Pakenham in a Class 1 over 1100m, sent out a short priced favourite and dashing very well off a moderate tempo to win convincingly. That was always going to be on the sharp side so out to 1200m only suits better, she can win again. LOVELYCUT (1) resumes. She went to the paddock a winner at Seymour and boasts some strong 3yo formlines in stakes company. She's drawn to get a long way back but will be rattling home. BLUE HAWAIIAN (12) is going well, beaten under a length as favourite at Cranbourne last time. She'll roll forward and have a map advantage over her rivals. BEFUDDLE (14) was better last time at this track over 1400m and will give a huge sight back slightly in trip. SOUTHERN CRESCENT (10) is flying and can bounce back from a narrow defeat last time.
